title: Starter overview
text: This starter implements the standard search and fetch tools for connector-like and sync-oriented ChatGPT apps. It keeps the server dependency-free so you can smoke test the MCP loop locally.

title: Apps SDK notes
text: Use the MCP Apps bridge by default for widgets, but a tool-only app does not need a UI resource. Read-only tools should be idempotent and include precise, machine-friendly input schemas.

title: Validation checklist
text: Validate the /mcp route, tool descriptors, and local smoke tests. If dependencies are absent, run syntax and HTTP contract checks and report the gap explicitly.

title: ChatGPT developer mode setup
text: Expose localhost over HTTPS with a tunnel, then add the /mcp URL in ChatGPT developer mode. Refresh the app after tool metadata changes.
